free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of alpha-particles
from even mass molybdenum isotopes
- Target-thickness is 0.70 to 1.1 mg/cm2.
- Target is self supported.
depletion layer of 500 um, to measure scattered
alpha-particles.
Total systematic uncertainty (<10%)
target thickness
1. DWBA (Distorted wave Born approximation)
2. Optical model
V.D
ANG-CM is polar angle (c.m.) between beam and alpha
